# token(for:)

**Type Method**

Returns a token of the specified type.

## Declaration

```swift
static func token(for tokenType: TransactionReporting.TokenType) async throws -> String
```

## Parameters

- **tokenType**: The type of token to generate.

## Return Value

JSON data in a Base64URL-encoded string.

## Discussion

When you pass a token type, this method returns a token.

For example, passing the [doc://com.apple.MarketplaceKit/documentation/MarketplaceKit/TransactionReporting/TokenType/coreTechnology] token type, returns a token for reporting a potential purchase related to your app.
